user_prompt: Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
actual_output:
I completely understand wanting to give it one more try before escalating. A little extra empathy can often turn a frustrating situation around. 

Since I don't have the specific details of the customer's issue in front of me, here is a highly empathetic template you can adapt, or you can share the ticket details with me and I will tailor it perfectly for you:

***

**Draft Response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I want to personally apologize for the ongoing trouble you’re experiencing with [specific issue]. I know how incredibly frustrating it is when things don't work the way they should, especially when you've already spent your valuable time trying to get this resolved. 

Please know that I am taking full ownership of this. I want to make sure we get this completely sorted out for you today. 

To make sure we don't waste any more of your time, could we try one specific step together? 
1. [Insert one clear, simple troubleshooting step or alternative solution]

If this still doesn't get us where we need to be, please let me know immediately. I will be keeping a close eye on your reply so we can get this fixed without any further delays. 

Thank you so much for your continued patience and for working through this with me. 

Warmly,

[Your Name/Support Team]

***

**Would you like to share the specific customer issue or ticket history? I'd be happy to fill in the details and customize the tone to match their exact situation.**
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly followed the user's instruction to draft an empathetic response and offered further assistance to tailor it to the specific context.
